title: Unit 1 Quiz — Smart Cities, Sustainable Future

options: able to continue without harming the future environment
questions.answer: able to continue without harming the future environment

questions.prompt: Choose Present Continuous for a temporary project:
options: The city has three metro lines.
Engineers are installing new sensors this month.
questions.answer: Engineers are installing new sensors this month.

questions.prompt: Accessible spaces are designed so more people can use them easily.
Renewable energy comes from sources that will run out quickly.
Electric buses are often _____ (quiet) than diesel buses.

options: basic systems such as roads, power, and water
questions.answer: basic systems such as roads, power, and water

questions.prompt: According to the unit reading idea, technology works best when…
options: citizens use tools and design respects culture and climate
questions.answer: citizens use tools and design respects culture and climate

questions.prompt: Right now the council _____ (plan) a shaded walking route.

options: spread over a huge desert area

questions.prompt: Comparatives compare two things; superlatives show the top of a group.
A good campaign poster should include…
options: a clear slogan and call to action
questions.answer: a clear slogan and call to action

options: a person who lives in a city/country and has rights there
questions.answer: a person who lives in a city/country and has rights there
